sections.title: 1. RDX Session
sections.subtitle: Foundation Layer (Logging)
sections.content: Session logging and tracking across agents and projects. The immutable history of the build.

integrationPoints: Receives session requests from all other systems
Provides session context to Lattice Sync for coordination
